name: Gerwin the Bard

sheet.name: Gerwin the Bard
sheet.background_story:
Gerwin was born with a gift of song and story and after making friends with a theif named Udo Dundragon hatched a plot to raise their station in life through false recounts of noble deeds and royal ascent as the pair stole a variety of valuables and artifacts to add believability to their story.

The pair now live comfortably, though perpetually hope none discover the depths of their lies.

description:

The pair now live comfortably, though perpetually hope none discover the depths of their lies.
